column1: # When the engine encounters a word whose name is in the def stack
# (and the def value is not an FnDef / ObjectType), it replaces the
# word with the def value at the pointer. The substituted value then
# flows through the dispatch loop as a literal — picked up by a
# pending forward, surfaced on the stack, etc.
# The spec harness pre-populates the def stack with:

column3: bare def reference yields its bound value
repeated reference yields two copies on the stack
def value flows into a forward arg slot
def value satisfies a stack arg slot
integers larger than ascii-tweak edge cases still resolve
